creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2007-12-14 18:03:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/gpodder   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  gPodder is a GTK2 media aggregator written in Python.  A user can
  subscribe to RSS feeds for podcasts, videocasts, and other similiar
  content and download media files found in those feeds.  gPodder also
  supports optional iPod synchronization support, MP3/OGG id3 tag
  editing, and Ogg-to-iPod synchronization.
  
  WWW:  http://gpodder.berlios.de
  
  PR:             ports/117413
  Submitted by:   Chess Griffin <chess@chessgriffin.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.248     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +85 -0     ports/multimedia/gpodder/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/gpodder/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/multimedia/gpodder/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +66 -0     ports/multimedia/gpodder/pkg-plist (new)
